description: Thomas Weber (thomas.weber@acme-corp.de) in the Berlin office reports that his VPN connection (laptop asset tag LT-8294) drops every 10 minutes since the network maintenance last weekend. He is unable to work remotely. His manager Julia Braun (julia.braun@acme-corp.de) has confirmed this affects the entire DevOps team.

short_description: Cannot access SAP after password reset
description: Maria Santos (maria.santos@acme-corp.de, employee ID EMP-4521) called from the Munich headquarters. After resetting her Windows password yesterday, she can no longer log into SAP ERP. Error message: 'SSO token invalid'. Her colleague Hans Mueller (hans.mueller@acme-corp.de) has the same issue.

short_description: Shared mailbox not receiving external emails
description: Ahmed Hassan (ahmed.hassan@acme-corp.de) from the Legal department reports that the shared mailbox legal-inbox@acme-corp.de stopped receiving external emails 2 hours ago. Internal emails work fine. This is urgent as they are expecting contract documents from Kanzlei Schmidt & Partner. Contact: +49 172 5551234.

Lisa Chen (lisa.chen@acme-corp.de) reports her Dell Latitude 7440 (asset tag LT-3847, serial DEL-X9K4M2) shows a blue screen (DRIVER_IRQL_NOT_LESS_OR_EQUAL) every time she starts up. Started after automatic driver update. She has a board presentation tomorrow morning. Her assistant Peter Klein (peter.klein@acme-corp.de) is coordinating a loaner.

Stefan Novak (stefan.novak@acme-corp.de) reports printer HP-MFP-F5-01 (IP 10.42.5.101) on the 5th floor of the Berlin office jams every 3-4 pages. Maintenance contract number MC-2025-8874. Affects approx. 40 users on that floor. Facilities contact: Monika Schulz ext. 4402.

short_description: MFA app not generating codes after phone replacement
description: Priya Sharma (priya.sharma@acme-corp.de, employee ID EMP-7832) got a new iPhone (personal device) and the Microsoft Authenticator app no longer generates valid codes. She cannot access any MFA-protected systems including Outlook, Teams, and ServiceNow. Currently using her husband Raj's phone to call the service desk.

Jan Kowalski (jan.kowalski@acme-corp.de) from the DBA team reports PROD-DB-03 (Oracle 19c, IP 10.50.2.33) response times have increased from 50ms to 2.5s average over the past 4 hours. Affecting the customer-facing order processing system. Approx. 5000 end users impacted. Related monitoring alert: MON-2026-44821.

short_description: New hire cannot access onboarding portal
description: Emma Fischer (emma.fischer@acme-corp.de) from HR reports that new hire David Park (david.park@acme-corp.de, employee ID EMP-9103, start date 2026-03-23) cannot access the onboarding portal at https://onboard.acme-corp.de. His AD account was created yesterday by IT admin Karsten Lehmann (karsten.lehmann@acme-corp.de) but the portal returns 403 Forbidden.
